content.en:
Ye Tian didn't know where there was the immeasurable origin qi for the time being, but he would go back to the True Mountain Territory first and then look for it.

But.

Ye Tian still let the copy body of the main body stay in the Black Saint Mountain to practice, and the copy body of the True Clan left the Black Saint Mountain.

Airplanes!!!!

Ye Tian walked out of the Black Saint Mountain, and immediately sensed a Venerable Great Ancestor, among which there were nearly ten middle-level immeasurable life forms.

At this time, these Great Ancestors had already surrounded the Black Saint Mountain.

"Alien Great Ancestor, tell me the method of entering the Black Holy Mountain!"

A mid-level immeasurable lifeform threatened.

Another Great Ancestor also said, "If you don't hand over the method of entering the Black Holy Mountain, then you will die here if you enter!"

In the face of these dozens of Great Ancestors, the ordinary primary-level immeasurable lifeforms had absolutely no power to resist.

But Ye Tian was a little disdainful.

Although his copy body is not as powerful as the main body, he has also cultivated the Infinite Body, but he has not spent any money to raise the Infinite Body of this body to the realm of Xiaocheng.

After all, there is no need to cultivate this replica body, otherwise it will be a waste of resources.

However, with the Infinite Body and the Infinite Dao of the Extreme Realm that he had just improved, his combat power was not bad at all, and he also had a combat power of three or four thousand immeasurable scales.

And these middle-level immeasurable lifeforms are not powerful, they only have more than a thousand immeasurable scale combat power, and the most powerful one is at most two thousand immeasurable scale combat power.

Therefore, he was not afraid of these mid-level immeasurable lifeforms at all.

As for those primary-level immeasurable lifeforms, he ignored them even more.

"Get out of here!"

Ye Tian said coldly.

Hearing Ye Tian say this, these Great Ancestors were furious.

"Kill him, he has definitely obtained a lot of treasures in the Black Saint Mountain, even if he doesn't know the way to enter the Black Saint Mountain, you can also get a lot of resource treasures by killing him!" said a great ancestor.

Suddenly, these Great Ancestors made a move.

In their opinion, it was definitely easy to kill Ye Tian who was a primary-level immeasurable lifeform, and they could erase Ye Tian with their hands.

However.

They quickly became confused!

Rumble!!!

Ye Tian immediately showed the combat power far beyond the primary-level immeasurable life form, and the infinite body on his body also exploded, and the colorless light shield alone blocked the attack of a great ancestor.

Airplanes!!!

A golden spear carried thousands of immeasurable scale attack power, instantly piercing the body of a primary-level immeasurable life form.

Puff puff!!!

A primary-level immeasurable lifeform was instantly killed.

This scene made the other clans completely unbelievable, instantly killing the top primary-level immeasurable lifeforms, what a terrifying combat power.

"Kill!"

Those ten mid-level immeasurable lifeforms didn't want to make a move, after all, it was enough for other primary-level immeasurable lifeforms to make a move, but now they had to make a move.

In an instant, Ye Tian collided with a dozen or so mid-level immeasurable lifeforms.

Click!!!

The surrounding space-time shattered, and the power of annihilation swept across the endless region.

I saw Ye Tian holding the Endless Golden Spear and knocking a mid-level immeasurable lifeform into the air, and the weaker middle-level immeasurable lifeform was directly hit hard.

This is still a number of mid-level immeasurable lifeforms fighting one, and if you fight alone, I'm afraid it will be even worse.

Soon, these middle-level immeasurable lifeforms were severely injured one by one, and they suddenly did not dare to stay, otherwise their lives would be in danger.

Whew!!

One by one, these mid-level immeasurable lifeforms fled.

In the blink of an eye, there was no one Great Ancestor around Ye Tian, and they all fled.

Ye Tian didn't chase and kill, it was quite easy to kill those primary-level immeasurable lifeforms, but even if each middle-level immeasurable lifeform was of average strength, its life-preserving ability was also very strong, and it was not something that could be killed with a few moves.

Besides, if he really killed too many Great Ancestors, if a certain Great Ancestor had an unusual background and attracted the attention of a high-level immeasurable lifeform, his identity as a copy body would have to be abandoned.

So, he left the place directly.

......

True mountain collar.

Ye Tian returned here, and then began to explore the news about the immeasurable origin qi.

It didn't take long for Ye Tian to find out the information about the Infinite Origin Qi, which was not a top-secret information.

Not too far away from the True Mountain Territory, there is a treasure place called the Immeasurable Sea of Suffering.

The reputation of the Immeasurable Sea of Suffering is very great, but all senior primary-level immeasurable lifeforms have heard of the name of the Immeasurable Sea of Suffering, and in the Immeasurable Sea of Suffering there is the immeasurable origin qi, but its number is extremely rare.

And the immeasurable sea of suffering is also very dangerous, and ordinary ancestors really don't dare to enter the immeasurable sea of suffering.

It's easy to get lost, and once you enter some areas, you won't be able to get out at all.

And the higher the cultivation, the higher the probability of getting lost.

It was rumored that there were high-level immeasurable lifeforms that completely disappeared when they entered the immeasurable sea of suffering, which really frightened countless Great Ancestors.

However, there is an immeasurable origin qi in the immeasurable sea of suffering, which is a necessary thing to be able to forge a perfect promotion!

Therefore, there are still some top-level primary-level immeasurable lifeforms with great potential who venture into the immeasurable sea of suffering to find the immeasurable origin qi.

For a long time, there have been great ancestors who have found the immeasurable origin qi, and they have all completed the perfect promotion one by one, while the greater great ancestors have fallen in the immeasurable sea of suffering, or they have been lost there, never to return.

Of course.

There are also great ancestors who find the immeasurable origin qi and sell it, but its price is extremely expensive, and ordinary great ancestors can't afford it even if they have everything.

Only some descendants of high-level immeasurable lifeforms or descendants of top-level middle-level immeasurable lifeforms could afford immeasurable origin qi with the help of their elders.

However, it will take a long time for there to be a trace of immeasurable origin qi sold.

Ye Tian couldn't afford to wait, so he naturally had to go to the Immeasurable Sea of Suffering to find the Immeasurable Origin Qi in person.

Anyway, he has copied many bodies, and he is not afraid of falling and getting lost, and he can always find the immeasurable origin qi when he tries again and again.

......

Immeasurable sea of suffering.

There are many ancient cities around, and there are many strong people of many races here, as well as eighth-order and ninth-order Dao Ancestors, among which the eighth-order and ninth-order Dao Ancestors are almost all cannon fodder.

These eighth-order and ninth-order Dao Ancestors who enter the immeasurable sea of suffering will not necessarily die, and if they are lucky, they can also come out and even get the opportunity to be promoted to a primary-level immeasurable life form.

After all, in addition to the immeasurable origin qi, the immeasurable sea of bitterness also has some other treasure resources.

Of course.

There are still few Dao Ancestors who dare to enter the immeasurable sea of suffering, and most of them are desperate, such as offending the great ancestor, then they can only flee into the immeasurable sea of suffering to find opportunities.

this day.

Ye Tian stepped into here.
